name: Naiyoma
cooked: I’ve enjoyed learning about mutation testing. I find it really useful, and I’d love to see a more comprehensive report on Corecheck. For example, it would be great to see mutants for net_processing, if that’s possible.
topic_title: Incremental mutation testing in the Bitcoin Core
topic_html_title: Incremental mutation testing in the Bitcoin Core
